content: Tenant/group switcher UX patterns for small multi-tenant web apps: Dominant pattern is navbar org switcher dropdown — one long-lived login session, 'active organization' stored separately in session. No full logout required to switch. Pattern: navbar shows current group name with dropdown listing other memberships; selecting triggers POST /Groups/Switch/{id} which updates session[ActiveGroupId] and redirects to Home. For users in only one group (most of 17 members), picker never appears — single-group users land directly. Group picker at login: show group select page only if user belongs to >1 group. Industry standard (Slack, GitHub, Linear): org switcher in nav, instant context switch without re-auth.
